notes: EPA FRS facility search by city/state. Returns industrial facility records with standardized address. No phone field in FRS table. Good for facility identification, not phone enrichment. Live-verified 2026-06-26 (Chicago=50+ facilities).

Chicago business licenses Socrata dataset. No phone field. Provides business identity at address — good for confirming LLC presence. Live-verified 2026-06-26 (3 results for RJ's Painting). Proof-of-pattern for city contact enrichment.
Paid BatchData skip-trace bridge. Disabled until batchdata_api_key set in Settings. Wraps existing server.js:skiptraceAddress(). One canonical API call path.
